headline: Greg Abel Era At Berkshire Hathaway Shifts Capital Toward Housing And Tech
summary: Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE:BRK.B) under new CEO Greg Abel is reshaping its capital deployment approach. The company has agreed to acquire Taylor Morrison Home, increasing its direct ownership in an operating business. Berkshire has also made a large investment in Alphabet, adding a major technology and AI platform to its holdings. Berkshire Hathaway sits at the center of many portfolios, and at a share price of $489.25, NYSE:BRK.B often serves as a reference point for long term compounding...
